tool_calls.input: {"code":"(def merged-prs (github_pull_requests {:state \"merged\"})); (def linear-prs (filter (fn [pr] (or (re-find #\"linear:issue-\\d+\" (:title pr)) (re-find #\"linear:issue-\\d+\" (:body pr)))) merged-prs)); (def created-issues (map (fn [pr] (github_issues_create \"acme/web\" (str \"Verify: \" (:title pr)))) linear-prs)); (count created-issues)"}
